name: ModMe Inbox & Master Data Architect Collection
description: Agents and skills for the Inbox→MDA→Supabase pipeline — ingest, categorize, enrich, and publish structured knowledge from the inbox into the data catalogue.

items.usage: ADR documenter subagent — captures architectural decisions from inbox notes
Transform processed inbox entries into structured documentation
Diagnose pipeline failures in ingest/categorize/embed workflows
Design Supabase schema evolution for new categories
Review ingested content for sensitive data before Supabase insert
Validate pipeline output quality with spec-traced tests
Verify MDA categorization output with three-layer review
Supabase DB patterns — RLS, migrations, pgvector, storage
Postgres optimization, query performance, and index tuning
Merge mature MDA discoveries back into agent instruction files
Regenerate AGENTS.md files as the MDA pipeline evolves
